text: My endo specialist told me my pain wasn’t my endo , he wouldn’t even acknowledge that my uterus was tethered to my bowel. Feeling very dismissed
It showed up on my mri, I had one surgery but only to remove my ovaries

Had an Mri ( not for a endo specialist ) they said they can not see anything my gyno suspects i have endo ( I also have been diagnosed with PCOS ) I am crippled in pain most days out of the month . It started about 4 years ago it would come for afew days and leave now I feel like its always there . I got the nerve blocking injection last Friday and the pain is worse ended up in a&e again got a ct scan they Said they cant see anything. Im due to get a laparoscop but the waiting list is 12 months . I am not sure if its a 360 scope . If endo is not found do you have any advice moving forward ? thanks
